# minimal-project

A minimal Node.js project that prints "Hello world".

## Language & Tools

- Language: JavaScript (Node.js)
- Entry point: `index.js`
- Package manager: npm

## Commands

```bash
npm start    # Run the app (node index.js)
```

## Development Notes

- Single-file project with no dependencies
- No test framework configured
- No linter configured

## Things to Avoid

- Do not add a build step without updating the `start` script in package.json
- Do not commit `node_modules/` or `.env` files

## Recommended Plugins

```bash
claude plugins install superpowers  # AI skills and automation (memory, scheduling, brainstorming)
```
